holdings.infoBox: AGIX is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.43%, Alphabet at 3.63%, Microsoft at 3.41%, Meta Platforms at 3.39%, and Space Exploration Technologies at 3.32%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Public-Private AI & Technology ETF (AGIX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund uses an index as a guide to select stocks globally that are involved in developing and applying artificial intelligence technologies. The fund has the ability to invest in both listed and private AI companies AGIX was launched on Jul 18, 2024 and is issued by KraneShares.
infoTable: Solactive Etna Artificial General Intelligence Index
